item.title: Iran and Israel exchange missile warnings as diplomats push for talks
item.description: Officials in Tehran and Jerusalem traded missile warnings while European diplomats sought an emergency negotiation channel.

item.title: China expands chip controls after new AI export dispute with the United States
item.description: Beijing announced additional chip-related trade measures after a fresh AI and cyber dispute with Washington.

item.title: NATO reviews troop readiness after Russia strike near Ukraine logistics corridor
item.description: NATO officials reviewed troop readiness after a reported strike near a logistics corridor supporting Ukraine.
